must_detect.matched_text: Subtle MNPI signal: draft BoD calendar indicating a possible share buy-back and tentative merger discussion with Công ty Cổ phần Ngọc Thịnh Energy is not yet public and is MNPI even if discussed verbally.

Cross-border transfers: permitted only to processors with equivalent safeguards; a transfer register shall note timing, recipient, and whether MNPI or PII was included; notify the Viet Capital Markets Commission (VCMC) if a breach affects investor disclosure obligations.

Data Processing and MNPI Handling Addendum (Vietnam) between Ngân Việt Holdings JSC (issuer) and Quang Nam Compliance Services Co., Ltd. (processor).
Personal data under Decree 13 means any information associated with or helping identify a specific person, including employee records, payroll banking details, and trading pre-clearance logs.
MNPI under the Securities Law means issuer/securities information not yet công bố thông tin to the market that would reasonably affect price; processor shall treat all draft disclosures and internal forecasts as MNPI.
Blackout window: employees and contractors are prohibited from trading issuer securities from T-10 days before scheduled công bố thông tin until 48 hours after posting on the exchange portal; exemptions require written approval.
Selective disclosure: no cung cấp thông tin chọn lọc to counterparties; limited disclosures to lending banks and kiểm toán viên are permitted under NDA solely for the agreed purpose.
Public status confirmation: the press release dated 15/09/2025 announcing a routine office relocation was posted widely and is non-sensitive; referencing it in internal emails is permitted.
Public filing reference: the Q3 2024 báo cáo tài chính was lodged on the market công bố thông tin portal on 20/10/2024 and is public; reprocessing it does not create MNPI.
Subtle MNPI signal: draft BoD calendar indicating a possible share buy-back and tentative merger discussion with Công ty Cổ phần Ngọc Thịnh Energy is not yet public and is MNPI even if discussed verbally.
Processing purposes: processor may handle employee onboarding, payroll, internal compliance, and transaction monitoring, and shall not use PII for marketing or for investment decisions.
Data subject rights: requests for access, correction, deletion, or withdrawal of consent under Nghị định 13 must be submitted to privacy@nganvietholdings.vn or Ms. Lê Phương An at +84-90-000-1123; acknowledgment within 72 hours and resolution within 15 days.
Banking data example: Mr. Trần Hải Long’s salary account information is processed for payment and tax reporting; any export of such data to third parties requires a documented transfer basis and consent where applicable.
Cross-border transfers: permitted only to processors with equivalent safeguards; a transfer register shall note timing, recipient, and whether MNPI or PII was included; notify the Viet Capital Markets Commission (VCMC) if a breach affects investor disclosure obligations.
Retention: payroll and banking records retained 10 years; compliance logs for trading pre-clearance retained 7 years; draft investor decks containing MNPI destroyed 30 days after công bố thông tin unless legal hold applies.
Security: encrypt PII at rest and in transit, segregate MNPI workspaces, and restrict access to named roles; audits may be conducted by Trọn Tín Audit JSC under contract without granting market-sensitive access beyond need-to-know.
Negative operational update: the internal IT patch schedule is unrelated to issuer valuation and, even if unpublished, is not MNPI unless it degrades the ability to meet công bố thông tin deadlines.
Breach notice: processor must notify Ngân Việt Holdings JSC via incident@nganvietholdings.vn within 24 hours of discovering unauthorized access to PII or MNPI and cooperate with market disclosure where required.
